message:
Add beads ephemeral artifact patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns to suppress recovery, backup, bad DB, rebuild, reindex,
and vacuum test snapshots that beads_rust (br) generates during
database maintenance operations. These timestamped artifacts are
transient and should never be tracked:

- .beads/*.bad_* (corrupted DB snapshots)
- .beads/*.backup_* (pre-operation backups)
- .beads/*.rebuild_* (rebuild-in-progress DBs)
- .beads/*.reindex_test_* (reindex probe files)
- .beads/*.vacuum_test_* (vacuum probe files)
- .beads/recovery*/ (recovery working directories)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -89,3 +89,6 @@ storage.sqlite3.bak
 storage.sqlite3.corrupt-*
 storage.sqlite3-shm.corrupt-*
 storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
+
+# CI/E2E test output artifacts
+artifacts/
